visa_types.name: Cultural, Sports or Religious events and for film crews
visa_types.documents_required:
- Document Checklist – Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7KM8qugvj4Nvy2BYf5C4ra/d37c5f3f3e24e6994a6d9c236fed056e/Document_Checklist-Schengen-Tourism.pdf)
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[svk > npl > en > Cultural, Sports or Religious events and for film crews > Visa Fees]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash/QR.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 5315 NPR (30 Euros) inclusive of VAT@13%, payable online by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:
- Children under 6 years are exempt from paying the visa fee.
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in Nepalese Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
visa_types.processing_time: From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Slovakia for Cultural, Sports or Religious events and for film crews purposes. Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Slovakia for Cultural, Sports or Religious events and for film crews purposes. Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

## Visa Fees

[svk > npl > en > Cultural, Sports or Religious events and for film crews > Visa Fees]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash/QR.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 5315 NPR (30 Euros) inclusive of VAT@13%, payable online by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:
- Children under 6 years are exempt from paying the visa fee.
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in Nepalese Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
- Document Checklist – Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7KM8qugvj4Nvy2BYf5C4ra/d37c5f3f3e24e6994a6d9c236fed056e/Document_Checklist-Schengen-Tourism.pdf)
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/slovakia/india/english/pdf/PhotoSpecifications.pdf)), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre.

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.

## Download Forms
Application for Visa
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Visit to family or friend visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for visiting your family member or friend.
General Public are hereby informed that family members of EU citizen are kindly requested to contact Embassy of Slovakia in ,Delhi pertaining to submission of their documents for visa.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Visit to family or friend visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for visiting your family member or friend.
General Public are hereby informed that family members of EU citizen are kindly requested to contact Embassy of Slovakia in ,Delhi pertaining to submission of their documents for visa.

## Visa Fees

[svk > npl > en > Visiting Family/Friend > Visa Fees]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash/QR.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 5315 NPR (30 Euros) inclusive of VAT@13%, payable online by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:
- Children under 6 years are exempt from paying the visa fee.
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in Nepalese Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
- Document Checklist – Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7KM8qugvj4Nvy2BYf5C4ra/d37c5f3f3e24e6994a6d9c236fed056e/Document_Checklist-Schengen-Tourism.pdf)
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/slovakia/india/english/pdf/PhotoSpecifications.pdf)), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre.

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.

## Download Forms
Application for Visa
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Business visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for business purposes. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days. This visa will be issued for business purpose only; for gainful professional activities (even if the work is not financially rewarded) you have to apply for a work permit.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Business visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for business purposes. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days. This visa will be issued for business purpose only; for gainful professional activities (even if the work is not financially rewarded) you have to apply for a work permit.

## Visa Fees

[svk > npl > en > Business/ Conference > Visa Fees]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash/QR.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 5315 NPR (30 Euros) inclusive of VAT@13%, payable online by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:
- Children under 6 years are exempt from paying the visa fee.
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in Nepalese Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
- Document Checklist – Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7KM8qugvj4Nvy2BYf5C4ra/d37c5f3f3e24e6994a6d9c236fed056e/Document_Checklist-Schengen-Tourism.pdf)
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/slovakia/india/english/pdf/PhotoSpecifications.pdf)), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre.

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.

## Download Forms
Application for Visa
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

- Children under 6 years are exempt from paying the visa fee.
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in Nepalese Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
- Application Form – Click here (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/en/ministry/slovak-diplomatic-missions/diplomatic-missions-of-the-slovak-republic)
- For more information : https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/dilli-en/services/national-visa (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/dilli-en/services/national-visa)

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/slovakia/india/english/pdf/PhotoSpecifications.pdf)), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre.

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.

## Download Forms
Application for Visa (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/en/ministry/slovak-diplomatic-missions/diplomatic-missions-of-the-slovak-republic)
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
